name: Workday, Inc.
summary: Workday, Inc. (WDAY) is the issuer referenced in this SEC exhibit, which is an equity compensation document — specifically a Global Notice of Performance Restricted Stock Unit Award granted to Aneel Bhusri under Workday's 2022 Equity Incentive Plan. The filing does not contain a business description; it details the terms of a performance-based stock award including share price targets, vesting schedules, and service requirements.
